qas.q: What does theacronym HIPAA stand for?
Patient's are given a copy of this explanation of privacy practices at their first contact?
Who should a patient contact if they observe privacy problems in their providers offices?

qas.a: A group of laws designed to protect medical records and other health information.

qas.q: Name one benefit of HIPAA privacy rule:
qas.a: Safeguards are established that healthcare providers must achieve to protect the privacy of health information.

qas.q: What does Title II provide for?
Name one patients' rights under HIPAA:
qas.a: The right to request that communications from the facility be kept confidential.

qas.q: Name one guideline that you can follow in the medical office to assure patient privacy
qas.a: Immediately report any suspected or known improper behavior to supevisors or the Policy officers.

qas.q: Describe what might be considered an accidental disclosure
qas.a: Physicians speaking with patients in semi-private hospital rooms.
